title: Thai Stir Fry with Crispy Noodles
description: A quick and easy Thai stir fry recipe made with crispy noodles, vegetables, and a hint of citrusy flavor.
instructions: Cook crispy noodles according to package instructions. Drain and set aside.
Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a wok over medium-high heat.
Add veggie stir and cook for 3-4 minutes.
Add beans and long beans, cook for 4-5 minutes.
In a small bowl, whisk together citrusy sauce, cozy coconut milk, chinese chili flakes, gooey honey, and syrian sumac.
Pour sauce over the vegetables and stir to combine.
Return cooked noodles to the wok and stir-fry until everything is well combined.
